description_long: This is a tall, rectangular urban cabinet with a sleek, modern design, featuring a dark matte finish. The front face displays subtle panel lines and two black rectangular sections near the bottom, possibly indicating access panels or ventilation grilles. There are also colored digital display panels or labels near the top, suggesting it may serve a functional or informational purpose in an urban environment. The word 'CASE' is faintly visible on the front, hinting at its use as a secure storage or utility cabinet. The sides are plain and flat, with no visible handles or openings, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The overall construction appears robust, likely intended for outdoor or semi-public use.
description: A tall, dark, modern cabinet with subtle panel lines, digital display panels, and a robust, minimalist design. The front features two black sections and faint labeling, suggesting secure storage or utility use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main access face with digital display panels, two black rectangular sections, and faint labeling.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a flat, featureless surface, emphasizing the cabinet's slim profile.
description_view_2: Rear view is plain and unadorned, with only subtle panel lines visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view is identical to the other side, flat and featureless.
